description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits VIEW_ANNOUNCE without first advertising view-sync capability.

assertions.description: Reader rejects VIEW_ANNOUNCE because the seed did not advertise view-sync capability.
Reader does not write an invalid manifest or governance view object after the capability violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix beyond positive optional-message proof into a real capability-negative interop case.
The seed still publishes a governance view object, but the generated transcript intentionally suppresses view-sync from HELLO and MANIFEST.
